gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/340)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/340)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ أَوْسَطِ ما تُطْعِمُونَ أَهْلِيكُمْ فَقَالَ مَا تَقُوتُونَ بِهِ عِيَالَكُمْ مِنْ أَوْسَطِ ذَلِكَ قُلْتُ وَ مَا أَوْسَطُ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ الْخَلُّ وَ الزَّيْتُ وَ التَّمْرُ وَ الْخُبْزُ تُشْبِعُهُمْ بِهِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً قُلْتُ كِسْوَتُهُمْ قَالَ ثَوْبٌ وَاحِدٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the average of what one is feeding his family. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What you are sustaining your family with, from the average of that’. I said, ‘And what is the average of that’. I said, ‘And what is the average of that?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The vinegar, and the oil, and the dates, and the bread, satiating them by it, once’. I said, ‘Their clothing?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘One cloth’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn Mahbub from abu Ayyub from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about, ‘. . . the average kind of food that you provide for your family.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is the kind of food which you feed your family, it must be of the middle of the two, high and low, quality that you provide for your family.’ I then asked, ‘What is the middle of such food?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is vinegar and oil and dates and bread to satisfy them once.’ I then asked about clothing them. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is one piece of cloth.’”
